message:
fix: Array slice tracking to handle constant array slicing

Agents fixed array slices incorrectly treated as ArrayLists:
- Added array_slice_vars HashMap to track slice variables
- Fixed len() builtin to detect array slices
- Fixed print statements to handle array slices
- Fixed subscript indexing on array slices

Test recovery: 37/98 → 43/99 passing (+6 tests)

Fixed tests:
- list_slicing, list_slicing_basic, slicing_negative_indices

Files modified:
- src/codegen/native/main.zig: Added array_slice_vars tracking
- src/codegen/native/statements/assign.zig: Track slice assignments
- src/codegen/native/statements/misc.zig: Print array slice detection
- src/codegen/native/builtins.zig: len() array slice support
- src/codegen/native/expressions/subscript.zig: Direct array indexing
